title: crypsinus stenophyllus
intro: Crypsinus stenophyllus, also known as Stenophyllus or Stenophylla, is a plant species belonging to the family of ferns (Polypodiaceae). The plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Crypsinus stenophyllus include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as wound healing and skin conditions like eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its therapeutic properties.
